description:
A multi-platform launcher for your anime games

Twintaillauncher is a multi-platform launcher that brings mod support, quality-of-life improvements, and advanced features to a variety of anime-styled games.
Changelog
Games
- WutheringWaves webviews will not act weird anymore as long as you use recent proton
Bug fixes and improvements
- App will no longer crash with failed to get TLS stream on fresh boot woops thanks random breaking change in a minor library version
- App will not longer fully combust if it encounters incidents like one above
What's Changed
- 2.2.1 by @TukanDev in #256
Full Changelog: ttl-v2.2.0...ttl-v2.2.1
